title: pelargonium × cavrianum
intro: Pelargonium × cavrianum, also known as the Red Form of the Mountain Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species within the pelargonium genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Pelargonium × cavrianum can be prepared for herbal use in various ways, including teas, tinctures, and essential oil extracts.
